findings.description: The latest worker handoff for `chat-route-shell` made no code changes and correctly identified the durable assignment as stale; it did not reopen any previously verified route-shell assertions. Current repository diffs still reflect the already-reviewed milestone implementation rather than new route-shell work.

Svelte Autofixer advisory items from the prior pass remain non-blocking: `activeDateKey` is synchronized in an effect for viewport/date state, and `bind:this` supports scroll/date-jump behavior. No new Svelte changes were introduced by the latest handoff that would require a new repair request.
